title: Oreoblastus himalayensis
taxonomy: Oreoblastus himalayensis is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Parmeliaceae. It belongs to the genus Oreoblastus. The species is classified as a type of lichen, a symbiotic organism consisting of fungi and algae or cyanobacteria. Oreoblastus himalayensis is typically found growing on trees and rocks in the Himalayan region. Its classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics.
